properties.label: Crown of Nightmares
properties.description: Jagged circlet of OctoBogz shell and chapel bone, still pulsing with the clergy-breaking plague.

properties.label: Eradicators Boots
properties.description: Steel-shanked boots for Eradicator squads; the soles still reek of burned Pritscher warrens.

properties.label: Gloves of the Assasin
properties.description: Fingerless gloves soaked in lamp oil and soot so assassins can climb chimneys unseen.

properties.label: Scroll
properties.description: Cheap parchment from the chapel scriptorium passed among mayors, mercenaries, and villagers.

properties.label: Scroll of Town Portal
properties.description: Sigils painted with powdered teleporter stone bind the reader to Nouraajd's lonely obelisks.

properties.label: Undestructible Belt
properties.description: Ballista cabling braided after the siege, now used to drag barricades through Victor's streets.

properties.label: Big-Fisted Belt
properties.description: A giant's girdle of ballista cable and knuckle-bone. It swells the arms with brute siege-strength while dimming every clever thought to a dull growl, and locks about the waist until the curse is undone.

properties.label: Gloves of Misplacement
properties.description: Supple assassin's gloves stitched with a mischief-rune that never sits still. They promise a scholar's poise but send every strike wide of its mark, and cannot be peeled away until a priest lifts the curse.

properties.label: Crown of Opposite Alignment
properties.description: A chapel-bone circlet that whispers borrowed brilliance while turning the wearer's will against itself. Wisdom floods in as courage drains away, and the crown clamps to the skull until the curse is broken.

properties.label: Skull Helmet
properties.description: Varnished troll skull worn as a cap by hedge-wizards; grim, but the dead brain-case keeps thoughts orderly.

properties.label: Helm of the Alabaster Unicorn
properties.description: White-lacquered helm crowned with a spiral horn; a relic of gentler heraldry that still steadies the mind.

properties.label: Crown of the Supreme Magi
properties.description: Three interlocking circlets once worn by a magi triumvirate; under them spells come quicker and colder.

properties.label: Thunder Helmet
properties.description: Giant-forged warhelm that mutters with distant storms; hair stands on end beneath it.

properties.label: Crown of Dragontooth
properties.description: Jagged diadem of dragon fangs set in red gold; whoever bears it speaks with a wyrm's authority over flame.

properties.label: Dragonbone Greaves
properties.description: Shin guards of split wyrm bone, light as ash wood and stubborn as old scars.

properties.label: Boots of Speed
properties.description: Courier boots stitched with wind-runes; roads seem to shorten beneath them.

properties.label: Sandals of the Saint
properties.description: Rope sandals a nameless saint wore into martyrdom; grace clings to whoever walks in them.

properties.label: Equestrian's Gloves
properties.description: Supple riding gloves from the old horse-fairs; hands move at a canter in them.

properties.label: Gauntlets of the Still Eye
properties.description: Thin gauntlets set with a dragon's dead eye at each cuff; the steady gaze quiets trembling hands.

properties.label: Girdle of Vitality
properties.description: Physician's broad belt lined with tonic herbs; the heart beats surer beneath it.

properties.label: Sash of Courage
properties.description: Campaign sash awarded for holding the gates; fear finds no purchase on the one who wears it.

properties.label: Shackles of War
properties.description: Iron war-fetters that lock about the waist and choose the field for you: no retreat and no surrender until the curse is struck off.

properties.label: Shield of the Yawning Dead
properties.description: A barrow-door hammered into a shield; the grave-cold face of it makes the dead hesitate to strike.

properties.label: Dragonscale Guards
properties.description: Thigh guards of overlapping wyrm scale, shrugging off both furnace heat and the claws of the deep.

properties.label: Armor of the Damned
properties.description: Blackshard, barrow-shield, troll-skull and rib harness fused into one damned panoply; the grave answers to whoever wears it.

properties.label: Wrath of the Dragon Father
properties.description: Crown, scale, greaves and guards welded into a single wyrm-panoply; the wearer speaks to fire as a father to a wayward child.
